arts.ttl: Haaland ignites Arsenal feud with social media dig
arts.sum: Erling Haaland has ignited his feud with Arsenal youngster Myles Lewis-Skelly following the 18-year-old’s red card against West Ham United. Lewis-Skelly memorably performed Haaland’s celebration after scoring his first Arsenal goal during the Gunners’ 5-1 win over Man City in early February, and the Norwegian has now hit back following the 18-year-old’s red card.

arts.ttl: Liverpool line-ups for Man City as Cody Gakpo and Wataru Endo decisions made
arts.athr: liverpool.news@trinitymirror.com (Ian Doyle, Paul Gorst, Theo Squires)
arts.sum: Our Liverpool writers make their picks for the starting XI at Manchester City today

arts.ttl: Arne Slot sounds Man City warning after 'surprising' season
arts.sum: Arne Slot's Liverpool have taken full advantage of Manchester City's woes during the 2024/25 season.

arts.ttl: Darwin Nunez drops Liverpool reminder as triple Man City team news hint dropped
arts.sum: Liverpool face a tough test on Sunday as they travel to Manchester City looking to extend their lead at the top of the Premier League table

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer agrees over 'tough' Man City vs Liverpool prediction as flaws highlighted
arts.sum: Liverpool will head to the Etihad Stadium on Sunday to face Manchester City who continue to have a difficult season

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland aims subtle dig at Myles Lewis-Skelly after Arsenal star was sent off during West Ham loss - amid celebration spat with Gunners teen
arts.sum: Lewis-Skelly was sent off when his yellow card was upgraded for a foul on Mohammed Kudus during Arsenal's 1-0 loss to West Ham on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Kevin De Bruyne future: Clear favourite for Man City star 'emerges' as Pep Guardiola makes admission
arts.sum: Newly-formed MLS outfit San Diego FC are reportedly firmly at the head of the queue to sign Manchester City attacker Kevin De Bruyne.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta makes Liverpool title claim as he details Arsenal dressing room anger
arts.sum: Liverpool can move 11 points clear of Arsenal with a victory over Manchester City on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: City v Liverpool programme: Ederson, Dias, Lewis and much more
arts.sum: Pick up a matchday programme for our Premier League clash with Liverpool at the Etihad Stadium. There’s plenty to enjoy in the latest edition of the programme ahead of the visit of Arne Slot’s side.

arts.ttl: Liverpool icon Jamie Carragher explains Erling Haaland claim after angry Pep Guardiola reaction
arts.sum: Man City manager Pep Guardiola has responded to comments made by Liverpool great Jamie Carragher.
